topic: OpenAI Codex Desktop Guide: Full Agentic IDE Workflows and GPT-5-Codex

key_points: Complete 2026 guide covering GPT-5.5 agentic coding features
Covers CLI setup, model switching with /model command
Explains GPT-5.4 vs GPT-5.5 use cases for implementation, refactors, debugging
Walkthrough of subagent and parallel task features
Focuses on multi-agent AI coding within the Codex app
Explains spawning agents from CSV with progress tracking
Covers the Skills browser for enabling specialized knowledge
Discusses automations and scheduled tasks inside the app
macOS-specific setup and feature walkthrough
Covers pricing tiers: Plus ($20/mo), Pro ($200/mo), Business/Enterprise
Security overview: sandboxed cloud environments, network isolation
April 2, 2026 switch from per-message to token-based billing
Definitive setup guide: AGENTS.md, MCP servers, Skills, config
How AGENTS.md layers global guidance with per-repo overrides
AGENTS.override.md for per-session customization
MCP integration walkthrough for Figma, Linear, GitHub connections
Desktop app guide covering multi-agent workflow management
Explains worktree-based parallel agent isolation
Covers built-in terminal scoped to current project/worktree
Plugin system: bundling skills, app integrations, and MCP servers

stats.fact: OpenAI Codex reached 3 million weekly active users by April 8, 2026, confirmed by Sam Altman
Codex crossed 4 million weekly developers by April 21, 2026 — just two weeks after the 3M milestone
OpenAI Codex recorded 90 million installs in a single week
Over 1 million people downloaded the Codex app in its first week after macOS launch
GPT-5.3-Codex achieves 56.8% on SWE-Bench Pro and 77.3% on Terminal-Bench 2.0
GPT-5.3-Codex delivers up to 25% faster execution on complex tool-driven workflows vs GPT-5.2-Codex
Codex usage has grown 10x since August 2025; within ChatGPT Business/Enterprise, usage grew 6x since January 2026
Token usage growing 70%+ month-over-month as of April 2026
OpenAI claims Codex CLI is approximately 4x more token-efficient than Claude Code API
Codex maintains 90% adoption rate among Fortune 100 companies
More than 2 million builders use Codex every week within ChatGPT Business and Enterprise as of April 2026
Most active Codex users send 17x as many coding messages as the median worker and report 5x more time saved
Codex switched from per-message pricing to token-based billing on April 2, 2026
Lightrun 2026 survey: 43% of AI-generated changes need debugging in production; zero leaders reported being 'very confident' in AI-generated code

angles: The GPT-5-Codex model family (5.2, 5.3, 5.4, 5.5) — understanding which version powers what and when to choose each
Parallel agent workflows via Git worktrees: how multiple agents work the same repo without merge conflicts
AGENTS.md as the key to consistent, reproducible agentic behavior across sessions and repos
Skills vs Plugins vs MCP: the three-layer extensibility stack and when to use each
Sandboxed security: how Codex isolates network and filesystem access during agent execution
The macOS-first then Windows rollout story — what the platform expansion means for teams
Test-driven development with Codex: write failing tests first, commit as checkpoint, have Codex implement until green
Token efficiency angle: Codex CLI's 4x efficiency claim vs Claude Code — real-world cost math for teams
Codex as a project manager, not just a code editor: automations, scheduled tasks, multi-agent coordination
From 0 to agentic: a practical onboarding guide for teams switching from GitHub Copilot or Cursor

H2: Understanding the GPT-5-Codex Model Family (5.2 to 5.5)
